segments.text: Hear my prayer, O LORD; give ear to my pleas for mercy! In your faithfulness answer me, in your righteousness!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Enter not into judgment with your servant, for no one living is righteous before you.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For the enemy has pursued my soul; he has crushed my life to the ground; he has made me sit in darkness like those long dead.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Therefore my spirit faints within me; my heart within me grows numb.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I remember the days of old; I meditate on all that you have done; I ponder the work of your hands.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I stretch out my hands to you; my soul thirsts for you like a parched land.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Answer me quickly, O LORD! My spirit fails! Hide not your face from me, lest I become like those who go down to the pit.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Let me hear in the morning of your steadfast love, for in you I trust. Make me know the way I should go, for to you I lift up my soul.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Deliver me from my enemies, O LORD! I have fled to you for refuge.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Teach me to do your will, for you are my God! Let your good Spirit lead me on level ground!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For your name's sake, O LORD, preserve my life! In your righteousness bring my soul out of trouble!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: And in your steadfast love you will cut off my enemies, and you will destroy all the adversaries of my soul, for I am your servant.
segments.speaker: David
